tasks.roguelike:compile: cd demos/roguelike && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx gulp build
tasks.roguelike:build: docker run --rm -v "$PWD/demos/roguelike:/app" -w /app node:10-buster sh -c 'npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx gulp build'
tasks.assemble: rm -rf public && mkdir -p public/h8ball public/roguelike && cp -r demos/h8ball/* public/h8ball/ && cp -r demos/roguelike/dist/* public/roguelike/
tasks.build: deno task roguelike:build && deno task assemble
